appraisal_events.evidence: « Swann … ne répondit pas et en se dérobant fit manquer la brillante joute »; Odette ajoute: « je ne suis pas la seule qu'il ne trouve pas à la hauteur. »
appraisal_events.explanation: Swann evades the invited exchange, spoiling the display Mme Verdurin hoped to stage for Forcheville; Odette publicly frames his withdrawal as contemptuous, which locally lowers his standing in the circle.

status_effects.explanation: By dodging the contest and prompting a peevish reproach from Odette, Swann appears uncooperative and dismissive.
